[ Projects ]

Selected projects

A static route prepared for inspectable project case studies: problem, method, result, code, write-up, and status.

/ Route prepared

Project pages are becoming proof assets.

This page will collect the strongest public work from the GitHub portfolio and connect each project to a technical write-up or note.

The goal is to make credibility easy to inspect for researchers, engineers, founders, recruiters, and collaborators.

/ Discovery

Static notes, RSS, and source trails for rigorous computer science reading.
